2604.27776.title: WindowsWorld: A Process-Centric Benchmark of Autonomous GUI Agents in Professional Cross-Application Environments
2604.27776.paper_summary: While GUI agents have shown impressive capabilities in common computer-use tasks such as OSWorld, current benchmarks mainly focus on isolated and single-application tasks. This overlooks a critical real-world requirement of coordinating across multiple applications to accomplish complex profession-specific workflows. To bridge this gap, we present a computer-use benchmark in cross-application workflows, named WindowsWorld, designed to systematically assess GUI Agents on complex multi-step tasks that mirror real-world professional activities. Our methodology uses a multi-agent framework steered by 16 occupations to generate four difficulty-level tasks with intermediate inspection, which are then refined by human review and executed in a simulated environment. The resulting benchmark contains 181 tasks with an average of 5.0 sub-goals across 17 common desktop applications, of which 78% are inherently multi-application. Experimental results of leading large models and agents show that: 1) All computer-use agents perform poorly on multi-application tasks (< 21% success rate), far below the performance of simple single-app tasks; 2) They largely fail at tasks requiring conditional judgment and reasoning across $\geq$ 3 applications, stalling at early sub-goals; 3) Low execution efficiency, where tasks often fail despite far exceeding human step limits. Code, benchmark data, and evaluation resources are available at github.com/HITsz-TMG/WindowsWorld.
2604.27776.paper_summary_zh: 雖然 GUI 代理在 OSWorld 等常見電腦使用任務中展現了令人印象深刻的能力，但目前的基準主要集中在孤立和單一應用程序的任務上。這忽略了協調多個應用程序以完成複雜專業特定工作流程的關鍵現實需求。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了一個跨應用程序工作流程的電腦使用基準，名為 WindowsWorld，旨在系統地評估 GUI 代理在複雜的多步任務上的表現，這些任務反映了現實世界的專業活動。我們的方法論使用一個由 16 種職業驅動的多代理框架，生成四個難度級別的任務，並進行中間檢查，然後通過人工審查進行精煉，並在模擬環境中執行。最終的基準包含 181 個任務，平均每個任務有 5.0 個子目標，涵蓋 17 個常見桌面應用程序，其中 78% 本質上是多應用程序的。領先的大型模型和代理的實驗結果顯示：1）所有電腦使用代理在多應用程序任務上的表現不佳（成功率 < 21%），遠低於簡單單應用任務的表現；2）它們在需要跨 $\geq$ 3 個應用程序進行條件判斷和推理的任務上大多失敗，停滯在早期子目標；3）執行效率低，任務經常失敗，儘管遠遠超過人類步驟限制。代碼、基準數據和評估資源可在 github.com/HITsz-TMG/WindowsWorld 獲得。
2604.27776.author: Jinchao Li et.al.
2604.27776.authors: Jinchao Li, Yunxin Li, Chenrui Zhao, Zhenran Xu, Baotian Hu, Min Zhang
